design_philosophy.core_loop: Select plays, execute football strategy, manage team roster and attributes across single games or full seasons
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Competitive football simulation: balancing offensive play-calling against defensive strategy while managing player stamina and roster depth
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Coach and quarterback a real NFL team with authentic rosters, player names, and season progression
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: First Madden to include both NFL team logos and NFLPA licenses, enabling named players instead of numbers; removed 'passing windows' as default option, emphasizing skill-based QB decision-making; represents real 1994 NFL rosters and player attributes faithfully

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Players can adjust game rules and mechanics via options menu (e.g., restore passing windows for easier play)

progression.upgrade_system: Individual player stat tracking throughout season; team roster management and player substitution at any position
progression.unlock_mechanism: Season play unlocks progression through NFL schedule; no unlockable past championship or all-franchise teams (removed from previous Madden iterations)
replayability_hooks: Full season mode with individual player stat tracking
Multiple difficulty adjustments via options menu
All 28 NFL teams with authentic 1994 rosters

world_building_techniques: Authentic NFL branding and team identity
Real player names and numbers tied to 1994 season rosters
John Madden as celebrity figurehead on cover and in branding

faction_indicators: 28 authentic NFL teams with distinct rosters and playstyles
Regional and divisional rivalries implicit in season structure
environmental_storytelling: Team logos and authentic uniforms reinforce NFL identity
Player roster composition reflects real 1994 season trades and signings
